summary: Iteration 60 - Phase 4: Unified Login, Partner Orgs Tab, TenantSwitcher, Signup Paths. 26/26 backend tests pass. Frontend TypeScript compilation error fixed (DialogFooter missing from shadcn-ui.d.ts). All Phase 4 features verified working end-to-end.

issues: TenantSwitcher is positioned using 'absolute top-0 right-0' inside a very narrow relative div (just the badge text span). This may overlay/clip the badge text (e.g. 'Administration') since the absolute positioning is confined to that small div. Ideally TenantSwitcher should be positioned within the wider hero section or the header row.

action_items: Optional: Review TenantSwitcher positioning in Admin.tsx hero banner - currently absolute top-0 right-0 inside the badge text wrapper div, which may clip the badge text on small screens
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: TenantsTab.tsx imports 'DialogFooter' from '@/components/ui/dialog' but shadcn-ui.d.ts only declared Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger. This caused TS2305 compilation error 'has no exported member DialogFooter', showing a blocking compilation overlay. Fixed by adding DialogFooter, DialogClose, DialogDescription, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay to the dialog module declaration.

AuthContext.tsx login function always uses '/auth/partner-login' endpoint - this is correct for Phase 4 unified login. The partner_code is required in the Login.tsx form (has 'required' attribute). If a user provides empty partner_code, the form won't submit due to HTML5 validation. Backend /auth/partner-login returns 422 for missing partner_code - all good.
TenantsTab.tsx: deactivate default tenant protection is in frontend (tenant.code === 'automate-accounts') and backend (tenant_id === DEFAULT_TENANT_ID). Double protection is good.
TenantSwitcher forces page.reload() when switching tenants. This is a full page reload approach which works but could be improved with React context/state management in future iterations.
seed_data_creation: Test tenants created during run are deactivated after test. 'ui-test-phase4-org' (deactivated), 'test-partner-signup-XXXXX' (created via partner self-signup), 'test-phase4-XXXXXXX' and 'test-phase4-admin-XXXXXXX' (deactivated via cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 fully working. Backend: 26 tests covering unified login via /auth/partner-login, register-partner endpoint, admin/tenants CRUD (list/create/deactivate/activate), add partner admin user, X-View-As-Tenant header for TenantSwitcher, and Users tab access. Frontend: Login page single unified form (no tabs), admin panel shows Users tab + Partner Orgs tab for platform_super_admin, TenantSwitcher 'All Tenants' dropdown in hero header, customer signup with partner code field, partner signup at ?type=partner. Bug fixed: DialogFooter missing from shadcn-ui.d.ts caused TS compilation overlay. File updated: /app/frontend/src/types/shadcn-ui.d.ts.

ts_compilaton_error.root_cause: TenantsTab.tsx imports { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogFooter } from '@/components/ui/dialog'. The shadcn-ui.d.ts type declaration module for '@/components/ui/dialog' was missing 'DialogFooter'. TypeScript threw TS2305: Module '@/components/ui/dialog' has no exported member 'DialogFooter', causing compilation overlay that blocked the app.
ts_compilaton_error.fix: Added DialogFooter, DialogClose, DialogDescription, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay to the '@/components/ui/dialog' declare module in shadcn-ui.d.ts
ts_compilaton_error.reproduction: Load any page after TenantsTab.tsx was added - compilation overlay appears
